homepage.title: RENFROE®
homepage.text_excerpt:
RENFROE®
The Leader in Claims Management and Innovation
The Leader in Claims Management and Innovation
RENFROE is a family-owned, independent, full-service claims management firm that has helped many of the largest insurance companies in the country take care of their customers for the past 30 years. We consistently achieve top marks in customer service and professionalism by upholding high standards and delivering exceptional service to our clients. RENFROE is a leader in developing and leveraging technology to streamline the claims lifecycle and deployment process.
RENFROE is a family-owned, independent, full-service staffing, adjusting, and claims management firm that has helped many of the largest insurance companies in the country take care of their customers for the past 30 years. We consistently achieve top marks in customer service and professionalism by upholding high standards and delivering exceptional service to our clients. RENFROE is a leader in developing and leveraging technology to streamline the claims lifecycle and deployment process.
Optimizing the Claims Journey for Carriers and Policyholders
Leveraging our decades of experience working within the property and casualty claims industry, RENFROE is committed to make the claims process faster, more efficient, and more satisfying for carriers and policyholders alike. We are achieving this through a combination of exceptional human resources and cutting-edge technology. Our offerings to carriers fall into three main pillars:
Claims Management
Property and auto claims management and adjusting. Includes daily and catastrophe adjusting, property loss inspections, quality management, and support solutions.
Technology and R&D
RENFROE is home to a robust research and development team that is building some of the most advanced technology the insurance industry has ever seen. Some of our solutions are already available for use by carriers.
Learning and Development
We've trained more than 50,000 claim professionals over the past 30 years. RENFROE now offers custom learning and development programs to carriers looking to outsource their staff training.
Solutions for Every Single Claim Need
RENFROE is equipped and experienced to provide carriers innovative and effective solutions for every stage of the claim workflow.
Catastrophe Claims Management
RENFROE has provided support to carriers of all sizes for every major catastrophe in the United States since 1994.
Daily Claims
Instantly flex your claims adjusting capacity in response to changes in your workforce or claim volume.
Property Loss Inspections
Use RENFROE’s highly trained non-licensed inspectors for low-touch, low-complexity daily claims.
Quality Management
Utilize our file review, QA, and estimate review and audit services to ensure you pay what you owe on every claim.
Claims Support
We offer support solutions that aim to make the claim experience easier for adjusters and policyholders alike.
Technology and R&D
Cutting edge solutions

about.text:
About RENFROE
About RENFROE
Optimizing the Claims Journey With Exceptional People and Technology™
As one of the largest and most tenured claim management firms in the United States, our resources have played roles in our clients' offices, remotely, and out in the field on a diverse number of disaster projects, oil spills, explosions, product liability/product recall, chemical releases, hailstorms, wildfires, hurricanes, earthquakes, tornados, floods, and ice storms in addition to general staffing needs.
RENFROE is committed to fostering a dedicated and
world-class workforce
, leveraging
technology
, communication, and
training
to be there for our clients
no matter the need
, quantity, or location. Whether during times of disaster, claims overload, or other demands, our talented team stands ready with the agility and
care
that our clients have come to expect and
trust
from RENFROE.
Our Mission
To optimize the claims journey with exceptional people and technology.
Our Vision
To simplify the insurance experience.
Our Values
Empathy, Excellence, Growth, Service, Integrity, Curiosity
Our Vision
To simplify the insurance experience.
Our Values
Empathy, Excellence, Growth, Service, Integrity, Curiosity
Our Team
Our extraordinary project resources and home office employees are backed by a world-class team of executives and leaders under the guidance of an experienced board of directors.

Contact RENFROE
Contact RENFROE
Need to reach us? Use the contact information below or drop as a line using the contact form at the bottom of the page.
Reporting Security and Confidentiality Breaches
To report a potential breach in security or confidentiality, please use the contact form below. Be sure to include the nature of the breach and what happened, but
do not
